history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian man with curly dark hair takes a mirror selfie in a gym. He is wearing a black sleeveless t-shirt, black shorts, and black weightlifting gloves. He is sitting on a weight bench, holding his phone in his right hand to take the photo. In front of him, on the bench, are several weight plates, one clearly showing the number "8" and another marked "10". The background is a gym interior with various weightlifting equipment, including dumbbells, barbells, weight racks, and exercise machines. Large mirrors line the walls, reflecting the gym and the man. The lighting is typical of an indoor gym, with overhead lights creating a slightly dramatic, focused illumination on the man and the equipment. The overall color palette is dominated by blacks, grays, and metallic tones of the gym equipment, with some red accents from the gym benches. The mood is focused and determined, suggesting a dedication to fitness. The style is realistic and candid, capturing a moment during a workout.
